title: Bryn Cnewyllyn Farm, Dyserth, overhead line diversion, S37 Consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  3 November 2025  Location   Bryn Cnewyllyn FarmDyserthWalesLL18 6HS   Type of project / consent requested  Section 37 consent to install or keep installed an electric line. "
